overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a muddy frontier camp at night during a heavy rainstorm. The player moves past wooden cabins and a lantern-lit pavilion, crossing an open area as lightning illuminates the stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier camp courtyard near supply storage

events.description: heavy rain begins falling visibly, creating reflections on the muddy ground
passing the lit pavilion and entering the open area between camp buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy camp toward the lantern-lit pavilion

entered.detail: vertical wooden plank wall of a frontier cabin with weathered texture
stacked wooden barrels and crates sitting in the muddy ground
open-air wooden pavilion with a hanging oil lantern providing warm yellow light
wooden fence marking the boundary of the camp area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beside a wooden cabin wall in a frontier camp at night. The camera moves forward past supply barrels toward a lantern-lit pavilion while heavy rain begins to fall, creating wet reflections on the muddy ground. The camp fence is visible to the right as the player approaches the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy area between frontier cabins

agents.ego_description: walking through the open camp area between scattered wooden buildings in the rain

entered.detail: cluster of wooden frontier cabins with warm lit windows visible in the distance
large silhouetted oak tree standing between the camp buildings

segments.scene_description: Having passed the central pavilion, the camera moves through a wide open area in the frontier camp. Wooden cabins with lit windows line the path ahead while the rain continues to fall. The large tree stands silhouetted against the stormy sky as the player progresses toward the distant buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: storm-lashed open area approaching distant cabins

events.description: bright lightning bolt strikes behind the distant cabins, briefly illuminating the storm clouds

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the rain as lightning flashes across the dark sky

entered.detail: bright jagged lightning strike illuminating the storm clouds behind the buildings
dark wooden building with sloped roof coming into view on the right

segments.scene_description: As the player approaches the distant cabins, a dramatic lightning bolt strikes on the left side, briefly illuminating the stormy sky. The rain intensifies as the camera moves closer to the wooden buildings, with a new structure becoming visible on the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a muddy frontier camp that transitions from a sheltered path into a wide, storm-lashed open area. It begins beside a wooden cabin wall, moving past supply barrels toward a lantern-lit pavilion as heavy rain begins to fall and create wet reflections on the ground. As the camera passes the pavilion, the scene opens into a wide expanse where the rain continues to pour and a large tree stands silhouetted against the dark, stormy sky. The movement then progresses toward distant cabins with lit windows, just as a dramatic lightning bolt strikes on the left to briefly illuminate the horizon. Finally, the rain intensifies as the camera closes in on the wooden buildings, revealing a new structure emerging on the right side of the frame.
